brand_personality: Premium, Playful, Warm, Clean, Bakery aesthetic, Modern F&B MSME
archetype: Organic & Earthy mixed with iOS Soft Utility

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#121212]
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[#121212]

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-black/5. Sticky top-0 z-50.
surface_strategies.product_cards: Dark Jewel Box (CRITICAL): Because uploaded product images have pure black backgrounds, the product cards MUST be bg-[#000000] or bg-[#0A0A0A] with rounded-[2rem] and overflow-hidden. Text inside these dark cards must be white/cream. This blends the image background seamlessly, creating a premium high-contrast look on the white page.
surface_strategies.feature_cards: Soft iOS Squircles: bg-[#FDFBF7] rounded-[2rem] border border-black/5 shadow-sm p-6 to p-8.
surface_strategies.buttons: Primary: bg-[#121212] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#2A2A2A]. Secondary: bg-[#FDFBF7] text-[#121212] border border-black/10 rounded-full.

layout_rules.spacing: Generous. Use section padding py-16 md:py-24. Internal card padding p-6 or p-8.
layout_rules.border_radius: Extremely rounded to mimic iOS and bakery softness. Use rounded-2xl, rounded-3xl, or rounded-[2rem].
layout_rules.grids: Bento Grid approach for 'Why Moobits' and Category previews. gap-4 sm:gap-6 lg:gap-8.

media.placeholders: For Bolu Mini, Bolu BIG, and Brownies: DO NOT USE STOCK PHOTOS. Create minimalist CSS geometry or SVG icons using the accent colors (e.g., a Warm Brown rounded square for Brownies) inside the product cards.

pages_structure.Global: Sticky Navbar with ID/EN switcher and 'Order Now' WhatsApp CTA.
pages_structure.Home: Hero (Dual headline, 2 CTAs, 'Pre-order based' small text, Cookie showcase) -> About Preview -> New Menu (4 Cookie Cards with 20% strikethrough discount) -> Best Seller (2 Bolu Mini cards with badges) -> Why Moobits (3 features) -> Category Preview -> Promo Banner -> Final CTA.
pages_structure.About: Brand story, premium imagery (if any) or typographic focus, Values.
pages_structure.Menu: Full Catalog with category filter tabs (Cookies, Bolu Mini, Bolu BIG, Brownies).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. MUST install and use lucide-react for all icons.

2. CRITICAL: The cookie images have pure black backgrounds. You MUST frame them inside cards with bg-[#000000] or bg-[#0A0A0A] so the background perfectly camouflages. Put white/cream text in these dark cards. This creates a high-end 'jewel box' aesthetic against the white page.
3. WhatsApp CTA everywhere must link to: https://wa.me/6283894855149
4. Implement bilingual content (Indonesian default, English optional) using simple React state/context.
5. Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, nav links, tabs, accordions).
6. Do not use generic Shadcn styling directly; customize classes to match the rounded iOS aesthetic (e.g., rounded-[2rem]).
7. Build the UI as a multi-page feel or smooth scrolling single-page app with distinct sections.
